title: AXValidationRuleResult
description: Interface representing the result of a validation rule execution, containing validation status and error information.

types.title: AXValidationRuleResult

props.name: valid
props.description: Whether the validation passed (true) or failed (false).

props.name: message
props.description: Error message to display when validation fails.

props.name: ruleName
props.description: Name of the validation rule that produced this result.

types.description: Result object returned by validation rules indicating whether validation passed or failed, along with relevant error information.
